title: Better Bookshelves
description: Better Bookshelves is a resource pack which makes bookshelves even better!
body:
## ![](https://i.ibb.co/3936t23g/Banner.png) Better Bookshelves is a resource pack which makes bookshelves even better! In order to maintain the look of the base game, the textures were also directly created from their default equivalent in vanilla. ## Requirements **Fabric:** - Requires Soduim, Continuity
**Forge:** - Requires OptiFine - Enable Alternate Blocks (Video Settings -> Details) - Enable Connected Textures (Video Settings -> Quality)
